form.formComment: Resuming after a three months break. Finished off last campaign 4 in a small field at Larkhill January 18 over 3200m, 31 len behind One For Snowy carrying 75.5kg. First ever race start 9 of 10 runners at Lower Machen November 9 over 3200m, 41 len behind Call Me Ken carrying 75.5kg. Needs to find best to be competitive here.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At very long odds at debut, finished seventh of 8 starters at Huntingdon on February 5 over 3200m, on slow going 22 len behind Wilde's Legacy with 71.5kg at $101. Second-up finished fourth of 9 runners at Hereford on March 25 over 3200m, 30 len behind One Knight with 68.5kg at $51. Has upside and should run well.

form.formComment: At debut, finished second in a small field at Didmarton on March 7 over 4800m, 1.5 len behind Electric City with 74.5kg. Certainly worth following up.

form.formComment: Having third race start. When unwanted in the market at debut, finished sixth of 10 starters at Haydock Park on March 5 over 3100m, 48 len behind Turbocharged with 64kg at $10. Last start finished seventh of 11 runners at Warwick on March 26 over 3200m, 26 len behind Saint Argente with 71kg at $101. Cannot be ruled out.
